# Lists Demo

## Unordered list (1 level)

- First item
- Second item
- Third item with a somewhat longer description that exercises the text content

## Ordered list starting at 1

1. Alpha
2. Beta
3. Gamma

## Ordered list starting at 5

5. Five
6. Six
7. Seven

## Nested list (3 levels)

- Outer item A
  - Middle item A.1
    - Deep item A.1.a
    - Deep item A.1.b
  - Middle item A.2
- Outer item B
  - Middle item B.1

## Mixed ordered/unordered nesting

1. First ordered
   - Bullet inside ordered
   - Another bullet
2. Second ordered
   - More bullets
     1. Deep ordered
     2. Still deep

## Task list

- [x] Completed task
- [ ] Pending task
- [x] Another done item
- [ ] Not yet done

## List items with inline formatting

- Plain text item
- **Bold item** with strong emphasis
- *Italic item* in the italic slot
- Item with `inline code` in the middle
- Item with a [link](https://example.com) inside

## List after a paragraph

This is a paragraph before the list.

- Item one
- Item two

This is a paragraph after the list.

---

## List items with multiple paragraphs

- First paragraph of item one.
  Second paragraph of item one continues here.

- Item two has only one paragraph.
